title: Hex Ways
description: An addon for Hex Casting that lets you make Portals with Immersive Portals.
body:
# This has been depricated!
I have lot about all of my own motivation for Hex Ways. However, someone else is working on a Hex Ways port to 1.20 for Hex; so keep an eye out for that!

The new Addon is [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-ways-1.20), made by the wonderful Shadow!


## Here at Hexxy Labs, we always strive for progress. And today we may serve that promise
Introducing the Hex Ways initiative! This is a new and great Hex Casting addon that adds in **_P.O.R.t.a.L.S_**
- Portable
- Optic
- Rifts
- that
- are
- Logical
- Science

We have instant item transportation, we have fast movements for people, but we don't have cool instant people transportation, so PORtaLS fix that, to make them is simple; just use the patterns we have discovered!

![Resize Portal, and Remove Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YHdZ4gTh/images/55ecc972b1cf0ba62a82723c315b1e513b924d53.png)
![Rotate Portal, and Set Sides Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YHdZ4gTh/images/7e757bd5b1f4d995740ec5b6f6f4cb61555acd8f.png)


Just amazing, are they? What are you waiting for? Try it now today! `please note: to many PORTALS may cause reality to slowdown or halt`

THIS MOD NEEDS:

[Architectury Api,](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

[Immersive Portals,](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals)

[Hex Casting,](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting)

[and Hex Gloop](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexgloop)
